## [09:05 - 12:04]

you'd listen back to your own voice, with the tone quality manipulated to evoke different emotions, it actually changed how the people felt themselves, which leads us to believe that when we're speaking, the tone quality that we're choosing is actually impacting our own emotions and how we feel, which has kind of big implications for mental health, right? So if you're one of those people and someone says, how are you doing today? And I'm fine, I'm okay, right?
